title: pleopeltis angusta var. angusta
intro: Pleopeltis angusta var. angusta, also known as the narrow-leaved polypody, is a variety of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, specifically a type of epiphytic fern native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Consuming the plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving respiratory health, and it may also be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as creams or ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
